g.title: iMCD_QSP
g.text: Idiopathic Multicentric Castleman Disease (iMCD) — QSP Mechanistic Map
IL-6 cytokine storm · siltuximab · tocilizumab · sirolimus · rituximab · anakinra · ruxolitinib

g.title: cluster_LN
g.text: ② Lymph Node Pathology (hyperplastic GC, plasmacytic, mixed)

g.title: cluster_IL6
g.text: ④ IL-6 / sIL-6R / gp130 Cytokine Storm (master driver)

g.text: ⑪ Drug PK Compartments (IV / SC / PO)
